birdList.name: B
birdList.rule: B f g x = f (g x)
birdList.speech: Tell me two birds and I'll give you the sequence.

birdList.description: Flips the order of arguments to a function
birdList.name: C
birdList.rule: C f x y = f y x
birdList.speech: You gave me two things? Let me swap them around!

birdList.name: I
birdList.speech: I hear you — and echo you back exactly.

birdList.description: Always returns the first argument, discarding the second
birdList.name: K
birdList.speech: I only hear the first caller — the second one? Nevermind.

birdList.description: Always returns the second argument, discarding the first
birdList.name: KI
birdList.speech: Sorry, I didn't catch the first — but I heard the second clearly!

birdList.description: Applies the second argument to the first, then the first to the result
birdList.name: L
birdList.speech: Tell me how to react — but first, you must react to me!

birdList.description: Self-application: applies a function to itself
birdList.name: M
birdList.speech: If you tell me how to respond, I'll make you respond to yourself.

birdList.description: Distributes the argument to both functions and combines results
birdList.name: S
birdList.rule: S f g x = f x (g x)
birdList.speech: I'll take your plan, split it, and have both act on the same input.

birdList.description: Creates a pair: stores two values and applies a selector function
birdList.name: V
birdList.rule: V x y f = f x y
birdList.speech: Give me two things, and I'll let the next bird decide what to do with them.

birdList.description: Duplicates the argument: passes it twice to the function
birdList.name: W
birdList.rule: W f x = f x x
birdList.speech: You want me to sing once? I'll sing twice!

birdList.name: Y
birdList.speech: I make it possible to repeat yourself, over and over again.

laws.description: Vireo pair with Kestrel selects first
laws.name: V x y K = x

laws.description: Vireo pair with Kite selects second
laws.name: V x y KI = y
